CustomField.description: Earliest Event - default. All events within Merge Span will happen on the Earliest event due Latest Event (PR) - All events within Merge Span will happen on the Earliest event due LLP Event - show only for engine events. All events within Merge Span will happen on the LLP Event due date
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Earliest Event - All events within Merge Span will happen on the Earliest event due Latest Event (PR) - All events within Merge Span will happen on the Earliest event due LLP Event - All events within Merge Span will happen on the LLP Event due date
CustomField.label: Merge Event
